assignment: QA gate: collab-bus readiness + launch-proof integrity

pass_criteria: collab/protocol.json exists and lists required_fields + ledger paths
all five ledgers (proposals/reviews/improvements/consensus/broadcasts) exist and contain at least one record
every ledger record contains required_fields (ts, run_id, commander_id, event, item_id, summary, evidence, confidence, source_refs) and event matches ledger type
JSONL append-only integrity: no truncation/restart warnings and writers use append-only semantics
adoption traceability: broadcasts reference consensus item_id and bundle/results persist adopted_consensus_item_ids + source_refs
fail_conditions: any record missing required_fields or wrong event type
telemetry_integrity_warning or evidence of JSONL truncation/restart
broadcast/adoption references not traceable into bundle/results
evidence: collab/consensus.jsonl cons-c002-collab-bus-hold: HOLD until append integrity + schema validation + adoption semantics

pass_criteria: swarm-state launch_proof.valid_for_success == true and no partial_reason
ledger counts reconcile: squad_leads_started==50 and workers_started==250 (ss-250)
child-agents.jsonl and swarm-state counts are consistent
fail_conditions: swarm-state status != success or valid_for_success == false
counts below 50 squad leads / 250 workers or mismatch between ledger and swarm-state

notes: Gate definitions are review-only; no source modifications performed.
Launch-proof failure here implies collab-bus adoption should remain partial until ledger integrity is enforced.
